title: Max Sum of a Pair With Equal Sum of Digits
titleCn: 数位和相等数对的最大和

testcases.input: nums = [18,43,36,13,7] Output: 54 Explanation: The pairs (i, j) that satisfy the conditions are: - (0, 2), both numbers have a sum of digits equal to 9, and their sum is 18 + 36 = 54. - (1, 4), both numbers have a sum of digits equal to 7, and their sum is 43 + 7 = 50. So the maximum sum that we can obtain is 54.
testcases.expectedOutput: 54 Explanation: The pairs (i, j) that satisfy the conditions are: - (0, 2), both numbers have a sum of digits equal to 9, and their sum is 18 + 36 = 54. - (1, 4), both numbers have a sum of digits equal to 7, and their sum is 43 + 7 = 50. So the maximum sum that we can obtain is 54.

testcases.input: nums = [10,12,19,14] Output: -1 Explanation: There are no two numbers that satisfy the conditions, so we return -1.
testcases.expectedOutput: -1 Explanation: There are no two numbers that satisfy the conditions, so we return -1.
